THE COURT SUBSEQUENTLY ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PLTF PEOPLE'S BANK TO RECOVER FROM DEF SILVER $7,195.47 PRINCIPAL $1,916.99 INTEREST TO NOVEMBER 6, 1998 $126.00 COURT COSTS $1,050.00 ATTORNEY FEES $10,288.46 TOTAL COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT AND NOTICE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVER, SHELLY, AN INDV. $7,195.47 PRINCIPAL, $1,050.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,916.99 INTEREST, $126.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,288.46
